pose_plan.label: Neutral Idle Anchor

pose_plan.notes: Attentive standing anchor for focused or listening loops.

pose_plan.notes: Neutral talking anchor that can loop cleanly.

pose_plan.label: Prop Ready Anchor
pose_plan.notes: Prepared stance for prop interactions and transitions.

pose_plan.label: Ambient Seated Anchor
pose_plan.notes: Start and end pose for seated ambient loops.

pose_plan.label: Back-Turn Bench Anchor
pose_plan.notes: Back-turned bench pose for ambient and off-screen variants.

pose_plan.label: Mug Ready Anchor
pose_plan.notes: Stable hand-ready pose for mug routines.

pose_plan.notes: Short-loop midpoint for subtle weight shifts.

pose_plan.label: Listen Soft Midpoint
pose_plan.notes: Midpoint for listening loops with a small body shift.

pose_plan.label: Talk Emphasis Midpoint
pose_plan.notes: Midpoint for talk loops with light emphasis.
